title: Tetrahydrofuro[3,4-c]isoquinolines as inhibitors of pde4
abstract: The compounds of a certain formula 1, in which R1, R2 and R3 have the meanings as given in the description, are novel effective inhibitors of phosphodiesterase type 4.
claims: Claims Patent claims 1. A compound of formula 1 wherein R1 is 1-2C-alkoxy, completely or predominantly fluorine substituted 1-2C-alkoxy or 2,2- difluoroethoxy, R2 is 1-2C-alkoxy, completely or predominantly fluorine substituted 1-2C-alkoxy or 2,2- difluoroethoxy, R3 is a group of formula (a) wherein R4, R5, R6 and R7 all are hydrogen, methyl or ethyl, or R4, R5, R6 and R7 independently of one another are hydrogen, methyl or ethyl, with the proviso that not all of R4, R5, R6 and R7 have identical meanings, or R4 and R5 independently of one another are hydrogen, methyl or ethyl, and R6 and R7, together with the nitrogen atom to which both are bonded form a pyrrolidin-1-yl, piperidin-1-yl, azepan-1 - yl, 4-morpholinyl, 4-(1-4C-alkoxy-piperidin-1-yl or 4-(1-4C-alkyl-)piperazin-1-yl ring, or a salt of this compound. 2. A compound of formula 1 according to claim 1 wherein R1 is 1-2C-alkoxy or completely or predominantly fluorine substituted 1 -2C-alkoxy, R2 is 1-2C-alkoxy or completely or predominantly fluorine substituted 1 -2C-alkoxy, R3 is a group of formula (a) wherein R4, R5, R6 and R7 all are hydrogen, or R4, R5, R6 and R7 all are methyl, or R4, R5, R6 and R7 all are ethyl, R4 and R5 are hydrogen and R6 and R7 are methyl, or R4 and R5 are hydrogen and R6 and R7 are ethyl, or R4 and R5 are hydrogen, and R6 and R7, together with the nitrogen atom to which both bonded form a pyrrolidin-1-yl, piperidin-1-yl, azepan-1-yl, morpholin-4-yl, 4-(1 -4C-alkoxy-)piperidin-1 -yl or 4-(1-4C-alkyl-)piperazin-1 -yl ring, or R4 and R5 are methyl, and R6 and R7, together with the nitrogen atom to which both are bonded form a pyrrolidin-1 -yl, piperidin-1 -yl, azepan-1 -yl, morpholin-4-yl, 4-(1 -4C-alkoxy-)piperidin-1- yl or 4-(1 -4C-alkyl-)piperazin-1-yl ring, or R4 and R5 are ethyl, and R6 and R7, together with the nitrogen atom to which both are bonded pyrrolidin-1 -yl, piperidin-1 -yl, azepan-1 -yl, morpholin-4-yl, 4-(1 -4C-alkoxy-)piperidin-1-yl or 4-(1 -4C-alkyl-)piperazin-1-yl ring, or a salt of this compound. 3. A compound of formula 1 according to claim 1 wherein R1 is methoxy or ethoxy, R2 is methoxy or ethoxy, R3 is a group of formula (a) wherein R4, R5, R6 and R7 all are methyl, or R4 and R5 are hydrogen and R6 and R7 are methyl, or R4 and R5 are hydrogen, and R6 and R7, together with the nitrogen atom to which both are bonded form a piperidin-1-yl, morpholin-4-yl or 4-methoxypiperidin-1-yl ring, or R4 and R5 are methyl, and R6 and R7, together with the nitrogen atom to which both are bonded form a piperidin-1-yl, morpholin-4-yl or 4-methoxypiperidin-1-yl ring, or a salt of this compound. 4. A compound of formula 1 according to claim 1 wherein R1 is methoxy, R2 is ethoxy, R3 is a group of formula (a) wherein R4, R5, R6 and R7 all are methyl, or R4 and R5 are hydrogen and R6 and R7 are methyl, or R4 and R5 are hydrogen, and R6 and R7, together with the nitrogen atom to which both are bonded form a piperidin-1-yl, morpholin-4-yl or 4-methoxypiperidin-1-yl ring, or R4 and R5 are methyl, and R6 and R7, together with the nitrogen atom to which both are bonded form a piperidin-1-yl, morpholin-4-yl or 4-methoxypiperidin-1-yl ring, or a salt of this compound. 5. Compound according to claim 1 selected from the group consisting of N-[Amino(piperidin-1 -yl)methylidene]-4-[(3aS,9bR)-8-ethoxy-7-methoxy-1 ,3,3a,9b-tetrahydrofuro[3,4- c]isoquinolin-5-yl]benzamide; N-[Amino(morpholin-4-yl)methylidene]-4-[(3aS,9bR)-8-ethoxy-7-methoxy-1 ,3,3a,9b-tetrahydrofuro[3,4- c]isoquinolin-5-yl]benzamide; N-[Amino(4-methoxypiperidin-1 -yl)methylidene]-4-[(3aS,9bR)-8-ethoxy-7-methoxy-1 ,3,3a,9b- tetrahydrofuro[3,4-c]isoquinolin-5-yl]benzamide; N-[(Dimethylamino)(morpholin-4-yl)methylidene]-4-[(3aS,9bR)-8-ethoxy-7-methoxy-1 ,3,3a,9b- tetrahydrofuro[3,4-c]isoquinolin-5-yl]benzamide; N-[(Dimethylamino)(4-methoxypiperidin-1 -yl)methylidene]-4-[(3aS,9bR)-8-ethoxy-7-methoxy-1 ,3,3a,9b- tetrahydrofuro[3,4-c]isoquinolin-5-yl]benzamide; N-[(Dimethylamino)(4-methylpiperazin-1 -yl)methylidene]-4-[(3aS,9bR)-8-ethoxy-7-methoxy-1 ,3,3a,9b- tetrahydrofuro[3,4-c]isoquinolin-5-yl]benzamide; N-[Amino(dimethylamino)methylidene]-4-[(3aS,9bR)-8-ethoxy-7-methoxy-1 ,3,3a,9b-tetrahydrofuro[3,4- c]isoquinolin-5-yl]benzamide; N-[Bis(dimethylamino)methylidene]-4-[(3aS,9bR)-8-ethoxy-7-methoxy-1 ,3,3a,9b-tetrahydrofuro[3,4- c]isoquinolin-5-yl]benzamide and a salt of one of these compounds. 6. Compound of formula 1 or a salt thereof according to any one of claims 1 to 4 for use in the treatment or prophylaxis of diseases. 7. Compound of formula 1 or a salt thereof according to claim 5 for use in the treatment or prophylaxis of diseases. 8. Compound for use according to any one of claims 6 or 7, wherein the disease is selected from idiopathic pulmonary fibrosis, diabetes mellitus type 2, diabetic nephropathy, non-alcoholic steato- hepatitis, dry eye disease and meibomian gland dysfunction. 9. Compound for use according to any one of claims 6 or 7, wherein the disease is selected from diabetes mellitus type 2, diabetic nephropathy and non-alcoholic steato-hepatitis. 10. Compound for use according to claim 6, wherein the disease is idiopathic pulmonary fibrosis. 1 1. Compound for use according to claim 7, wherein the disease is idiopathic pulmonary fibrosis. 12. Compound for use according to claim 6, wherein the disease is dry eye disease. 13. Compound for use according to claim 7, wherein the disease is dry eye disease. 14. Compound for use according to claim 6, wherein the disease is meibomian gland dysfunction. 15. Compound for use according to claim 7, wherein the disease is meibomian gland dysfunction. 16. Pharmaceutical composition comprising at least one of the compounds of formula 1 or a salt thereof according to anyone of claims 1 to 4 together with at least one pharmaceutically acceptable auxiliary. 17. Pharmaceutical composition comprising a compound of formula 1 or a salt thereof according to claim 5 together with at least one pharmaceutically acceptable auxiliary. 18. Method of treating or preventing a disease, which is alleviated by inhibition of the type 4 phosphodiesterase comprising administering to a patient in need thereof a therapeutically effective amount of a compound of formula 1 or a salt thereof according to any one of claims 1 to 4. 19. Method of treating or preventing a disease, which is alleviated by inhibition of the type 4 phosphodiesterase comprising administering to a patient in need thereof a therapeutically effective amount of a compound of formula 1 or a salt thereof according to claim 5. 20. The method according to claim 18, wherein the disease is selected from the group consisting of idiopathic pulmonary fibrosis, diabetes mellitus type 2, diabetic nephropathy, non-alcoholic steato- hepatitis, dry eye disease and meibomian gland dysfunction. 21. The method according to claim 19, wherein the disease is selected from the group consisting of idiopathic pulmonary fibrosis, diabetes mellitus type 2, diabetic nephropathy, non-alcoholic steato- hepatitis, dry eye disease and meibomian gland dysfunction. 22. The method according to claim 18, wherein the disease is idiopathic pulmonary fibrosis. 23. The method according to claim 19, wherein the disease is idiopathic pulmonary fibrosis. 24. The method according to claim 18, wherein the disease is selected from the group consisting of diabetes mellitus type 2, diabetic nephropathy and non-alcoholic steato-hepatitis. 25. The method according to claim 19, wherein the disease is selected from the group consisting of diabetes mellitus type 2, diabetic nephropathy and non-alcoholic steato-hepatitis. 26. The method according to claim 18, wherein the disease is dry eye disease. 27. The method according to claim 19, wherein the disease is dry eye disease. 28. The method according to claim 18, wherein the disease is meibomian gland dysfunction. 29. The method according to claim 19, wherein the disease is meibomian gland dysfunction.
